changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create module_study_user_role table with BIGSERIAL PK (IDENTITY strategy)

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Create sequence for BIGSERIAL PK and set default
changeSet.sql: CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS module_study_user_role_id_seq START 1
ALTER TABLE module_study_user_role ALTER COLUMN study_user_role_id SET DEFAULT nextval('module_study_user_role_id_seq'::regclass)

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Copy existing data from legacy study_user_role table (PK auto-generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO module_study_user_role (role_name, study_id, user_name, status_id, owner_id) SELECT role_name, study_id, user_name, status_id, owner_id FROM study_user_role

changeSet.author: research-edc
changeSet.comment: Set sequence to max existing study_user_role_id
changeSet.sql: SELECT setval('module_study_user_role_id_seq', COALESCE((SELECT MAX(study_user_role_id) FROM study_user_role), 1))
